description: Applied Intuition is powering the future of physical AI, building tools and infrastructure, operating systems, and autonomy for the automotive, defense, trucking, construction, mining, and agriculture industries.
Canva is a graphic design platform that allows users to create visual content.
Anduril designs advanced defense technology systems, including drones and surveillance equipment.
Stripe offers payment processing software and APIs for online businesses.
Airbnb is an online marketplace for lodging, primarily homestays, and tourism experiences.
Snap Inc. is the parent company of Snapchat, a multimedia messaging app.
Instacart provides grocery delivery and pick-up services from local stores.
Voice AI built for India
Human potential perfected by AI
Monzo is a digital bank offering personal and business banking services.
Remote helps companies manage global payroll, benefits, and compliance for international teams.
PhysicsX specializes in using advanced physics simulations for industrial applications.
Mark43 offers cloud-based public safety software for law enforcement agencies.
Lottie connects families with elderly care homes through a user-friendly platform.
Scaling medication access with clinical AI
Hive offers AI-based solutions for content moderation, visual search, and other applications.
Fever is a powertech company building an API-centric platform for virtual power plants.
Upside offers cashback and rewards for purchases made at participating stores and restaurants.
Lemonade provides renters and homeowners insurance powered by AI.
Factorial offers HR software solutions for small and medium-sized businesses.
Fivetran delivers automated data integration, making it easy to centralize data from various sources.
Finom offers digital financial services for freelancers and small businesses.
Commure develops software to connect healthcare data and improve clinical workflows.
Melio simplifies accounts payable and receivable processes for small businesses.
The first agentic IDE, and then some. The Windsurf Editor is where the work of developers and AI truly flow together, allowing for a coding experience that feels like literal magic.
Circle is a global financial technology firm enabling internet-based payments and financial infrastructure.
Teambridge is composable workforce infrastructure. Unlike traditional software, it’s easily and endlessly customizable, so businesses can bring to life what makes them unique—and win.
Sword offers virtual physical therapy services through a combination of AI and human expertise.

Aidoc is a pioneering force in Clinical AI, empowering healthcare teams to optimize patient treatment and improve clinical outcomes and economic value. Built on Aidoc's proprietary aiOS™, our solutions analyze and aggregate medical data to help care teams operationalize the unexpected while maintaining a patient-first focus. With 20+ FDA-cleared solutions and adoption in over 1,500 hospitals worldwide, Aidoc leads the industry in providing real-time decision support for physicians.
Eightfold uses AI to help companies with talent acquisition, management, and retention.
Mistral AI develops innovative, open-source AI models that transform business operations and products.
Livongo provides digital health solutions to manage chronic conditions like diabetes, hypertension, and behavioral health.
Modular offers AI infrastructure solutions to accelerate machine learning development and deployment.
Warby Parker offers affordable eyewear and a try-at-home service.
GitLab is a comprehensive DevOps platform enabling collaborative software development.
Illumio provides cybersecurity solutions to prevent the spread of breaches within data centers and cloud environments.
Alsym Energy develops safer, more affordable, and environmentally friendly batteries.
Charm Industrial focuses on carbon removal and bio-oil production from biomass.
Cobot provides coworking space management software for community managers and space operators.
Tractian offers predictive maintenance solutions using IoT sensors and AI analytics.
Samsara provides IoT solutions for fleet management, industrial operations, and workplace safety.
Vannevar builds advanced AI solutions for national security and defense applications.
Helsing develops AI-based defense and security solutions for national defense.
CRED rewards credit card users for on-time payments with exclusive offers and experiences.
Ramp provides corporate card and spend management solutions for businesses.
Hippocratic AI develops medical AI systems focused on improving healthcare delivery and patient outcomes.
Ethon AI specializes in using AI to improve manufacturing processes and quality control.
Kayak is a travel search engine for finding flights, hotels, and rental cars.
Maven Clinic offers virtual care for women and families, providing services from fertility to pediatrics.
Gusto offers cloud-based payroll, benefits, and HR management software for small businesses.
Doccla offers remote patient monitoring solutions for hospitals and healthcare providers.
Latent creates AI technology for predictive analytics and data-driven insights.
Kavak is an online platform for buying and selling pre-owned cars in Latin America.
SonarSource provides tools for continuous code quality and security.
Devoted Health offers Medicare Advantage plans with a focus on member-centric care.
Nova Credit provides cross-border credit reporting, helping immigrants access financial products.
ClassDojo connects teachers with students and parents to share feedback and classroom moments.
Demandware offers cloud-based e-commerce solutions for retailers.
Neko Health focuses on preventive healthcare through advanced scanning technology.
Multiverse provides professional apprenticeship programs in tech and business skills.
Loop offers returns management software for e-commerce businesses.
